summary: First pass end-to-end testing of ProfilePilot web app (FastAPI backend + React landing). All 6 backend tests passed (root, /ai-workspace laravel & nextjs, /ai-workspace empty prompt 400, /workspaces/export+GET persistence, legacy /status). All frontend flows verified: hero headline present, nav links smooth-scroll, hero CTAs visible, interactive AI demo runs /api/ai-workspace and updates plan preview panel (verified Laravel Dev plan with 6 items and Next.js plan), quick-pick pills fill input, Save Workspace shows 'Saved', Copy build script updates to 'Copied' state, FAQ accordion expands/collapses on click (first item is open by default per useState(0)), footer GitHub link visible.

issues: Clipboard writeText throws NotAllowedError in some browser contexts (surfaces as a webpack dev-server error overlay in preview). Button UI still updates to 'Copied' but the error should be caught silently and a fallback (document.execCommand or textarea) used for non-secure/permission-denied contexts.

action_items: Optional: wrap navigator.clipboard.writeText in try/catch with a document.execCommand('copy') fallback in Downloads.jsx to avoid uncaught clipboard errors in preview/insecure contexts.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /workspaces/export accepts client-supplied id; consider forcing server-generated uuid to prevent id collision/spoofing.
server.py: LLM JSON parsing only strips one fenced block; if model returns text before/after JSON it will 502. Consider regex-extracting first {...} block.

Downloads.jsx (frontend): navigator.clipboard.writeText is not wrapped in try/catch — throws unhandled promise rejection in browsers without clipboard permission (visible in preview via CRA error overlay).
seed_data_creation: Test workspace 'TEST_Workspace' inserted via /api/workspaces/export; TEST_client via /api/status. Cleanup not automated.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py runs green (6/6). Frontend all data-testid selectors match components in /app/frontend/src/components/landing/. FAQ starts with first item open (useState(0)); tests must account for that. /api/ai-workspace hits Claude Sonnet 4.5 with 6-10s latency.
